note: seq=83: deploy Meta Guardian v2 at FAST 45s cadence (was ~3min) for as-fast-as-possible problem detection. meta_guardian.py v2 (sha 3af294851ad6, selftest-reproduced PASS in sandbox) extends the watch-list (every atlas unit + PG + pipe freshness + improvement-engine timers + feed freshness), poison-pill/park-after-N healing, and brain-learning of failures. Self-heals (restart/kick) within heal-ledger limits and escalates the rest to guardian-latest.json + meta-guardian-status.json. selftest-gated; the existing puller restore-point/rollback still owns any apply. Detection latency drops to ~45s/component. Predictive coverage: pipe-freshness slip, enrich_queue runaway (depth climbing/not draining), load-per-core + disk thresholds; the batch-canary probe already trends PG conns-toward-ceiling + load spikes. NOTE: deeper forecasting (rate-slope, RAM-creep regression) + the bolder-engine + app FLOW tab + CKAN/SoS are sequenced next.

steps.note: seq=83: Meta Guardian v2 @45s fast cadence + predictive watch (freshness/runaway/load), selftest-gated.

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import hashlib,sys; w={'/opt/atlas/guardian/meta_guardian.py':'3af294851ad69fd923a5d36c7ab1cf2b6b93a4832df817e3d250471bdf8cee72'}; [sys.exit('SHA MISMATCH '+p) for p,h in w.items() if hashlib.sha256(open(p,'rb').read()).hexdigest()!=h]; print('guardian sha ok')"

steps.content:
[Unit]
Description=ATLAS Meta Guardian v2 (fast supervisory self-heal + predictive watch)
After=network-online.target postgresql.service
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=oneshot
Nice=5
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/db.env
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/autopull.env
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/audit.env
ExecStart=/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python /opt/atlas/guardian/meta_guardian.py --once
TimeoutStartSec=50

[Unit]
Description=ATLAS Meta Guardian v2 timer (FAST 45s cadence)

[Timer]
OnBootSec=30s
OnUnitActiveSec=45s
AccuracySec=5s
Unit=atlas-guardian.service

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import os,subprocess as s; s.run(['systemctl','daemon-reload']); s.run(['systemctl','enable','atlas-guardian.timer']); s.run(['systemctl','restart','atlas-guardian.timer']); s.run(['systemctl','reset-failed','atlas-guardian.service']); s.run(['systemctl','start','--no-block','atlas-guardian.service']); print('meta-guardian v2 @45s live')"
